template1.title: email notification to product Buyer to add review to the product

emailfields0.subject: Share Your Experience - We would Love Your Feedback!
emailfields0.body:
Dear {{product.buyer}},

Thank you for your recent purchase of {{product.name}}! We hope you are enjoying it.

Your feedback is valuable to us and helps other customers make informed decisions. We would greatly appreciate it if you could take a moment to leave a review about your experience with {{product.name}}.

👉 [Leave a Review]( Click Here )

It only takes a minute, and your insights mean the world to us!

Thank you for being a valued customer. If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out.

smsfields0.body: You have bought {{product.buyer}}. Please find add review link on your mail.

webfields0.subject: Share Your Experience - We would Love Your Feedback!
webfields0.body: You have bought {{product.buyer}}. Please find add review link on your mail.

template2.title: Email Notification for Customer-Specific Discount Coupon

emailfields0.subject: Exclusive Offer Just for You – Your Discount Coupon Inside!
emailfields0.body:
Dear {{user.name}},

We’ve got something special just for you! As one of our valued customers, you’ve unlocked an Exclusive Discount Coupon to make your next shopping experience even better.

Coupon Code: {{coupon.code}}

Discount: {{coupon.discount}} off your next order

Valid Till: {{coupon.expiry}}

Applies To: {{coupon.description}}

Don’t miss out on the chance to grab your favorites at a special price before it’s gone.

We truly appreciate your continued support and look forward to serving you again.

Warm regards,
Team Quick2Cart

smsfields0.body: Hi {{user.name}}, you’ve got an exclusive coupon {{coupon.code}} worth {{coupon.discount}}! Check your email to use it before {{coupon.expiry}}.

webfields0.subject: Your Exclusive Discount is Here!
webfields0.body: Hey {{user.name}}, use coupon {{coupon.code}} and enjoy {{coupon.discount}} off. Valid until {{coupon.expiry}}. Use it now!

replacement_tags.name: coupon.description
replacement_tags.description: Details about what the coupon applies to

template3.title: Send OTP to user for verification

emailfields0.subject: Your One Time Password (OTP) for Verification
emailfields0.body:
Dear User,

Your OTP for verification is: {{user.otp}}.
This OTP is valid for 10 minutes.

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

Thank you,
Team Quick2Cart

smsfields0.body: Your OTP for {{subject.site}} is {{user.otp}}. It is valid for 10 minutes.
